class.name: ARTrackedRaycast
class.brief_description: A continuously-tracked raycast that updates as the scene evolves.
class.description: Created by [method ARSession.tracked_raycast]. Continuously refines raycast results as ARKit learns more about the environment. Call [method stop_tracking] to end. [b]iOS only.[/b] On visionOS/macOS, [method ARSession.tracked_raycast] always returns null.

method.name: stop_tracking
method.description: Stops the tracked raycast and prevents further callback updates.

members.member: Whether the tracked raycast is still active and producing updates.
